raw_consumer_statement:
American Express credit card initiated an auto pay deduction from my bank account that was unauthorized. As a result, my bank account is overdrawn. This is the second time this has happened in 2 months. The first time, I called and asked for autopay to be cancelled, but it happened again today. 

American Express is claiming that I needed to call them back after the payment processed to cancel autopay, which is simply not the case. They proved that after I received an email from them this confirming that I am unenrolled in autopay. 

I have no answers and no remedy from American Express. I am left to wait until the payment clears before any options can be discussed.
